Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthenticationException

Packages that use AuthenticationException
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.petstore.auth
Petstore auth helpers — stub validators and other glue used by the deployment-side AuthFilterChain configurations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that throw AuthenticationException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    RestContext.authenticate(RestOpSession session)
    Runs the effective authenticator chain for this request, folding results and applying the resolved principal/roles to the RestRequest.

    AuthenticationException.wwwAuthenticate(String value)
    Sets the WWW-Authenticate response header to the supplied challenge string.

    Description
    static void
    AuthFilter.sendChallenge(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse resp, AuthenticationException e)
    Writes a 401 response with the WWW-Authenticate challenge from the exception.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<AuthResult>
    ApiKeyAuthFilter.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
     
    Optional<AuthResult>
    Authenticator.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
    Inspects the request and returns the authentication result.
    Optional<AuthResult>
    AuthFilterChain.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest hreq)
    Runs the composed AuthFilter entries for the request and folds their results, without writing any response.
    Optional<AuthResult>
    BearerTokenAuthFilter.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
     
    abstract Optional<AuthResult>
    RestAuthenticator.authenticate(RestRequest req)
    Resolves identity + roles for the request.
    Principal
    TokenValidator.validate(String token)
    Validates the supplied bearer token and returns the associated Principal.

  • Uses of AuthenticationException in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp that throw AuthenticationException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<AuthResult>
    OidcSessionAuthFilter.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
     
    int
    OidcRelyingParty.backChannelLogout(String logoutToken)
    Processes an IdP-pushed OpenID Connect back-channel logout token, invalidating the matching server-side session(s).
    void
    OidcRelyingParty.completeLogin(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse res)
    Completes the login flow: parses the callback, verifies + consumes state, exchanges the code (PKCE), validates the ID token (signature / iss / aud / exp / nonce), creates a session, sets the session cookie, and redirects to the application.
    ClaimsPrincipal
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.validate(String idToken, String expectedNonce)
    Validates an ID token and projects the verified claims onto a ClaimsPrincipal.

    SamlAssertionValidator.validate(String xml)
    Validates the supplied SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> XML and returns the resolved principal.
